title: dioscorea orientalis
intro: Dioscorea orientalis, also known as the Chinese yam or oriental yam, is a species of yam native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea orientalis include reducing blood sugar levels, improving cardiovascular health, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through drying and powdering the tuber, or by extracting its active compounds through decoction or infusion.
